list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'powered_off'
list.name: suppressed_powered_off
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'powered_off'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'backup_overdue'
list.name: suppressed_backup
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'backup_overdue'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'active_alert'
list.name: suppressed_alerts
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(identifier, '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'active_alert'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(replace(identifier, '.', '\.'), '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'high_memory_host'
list.name: suppressed_high_memory
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg(replace(identifier, '.', '\.'), '|'), '^$') FROM platform_suppressions WHERE category = 'high_memory_host'

targets.expr: count(up{job=~"node|windows"} == 0 and on(instance) node_windows:up_recent_7d == 1) or vector(0)

count(
  (1 - avg by(host)(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",job="node"}[10m]))) * 100 > 80
  or
  (1 - avg by(host)(rate(windows_cpu_time_total{mode="idle",job="windows"}[10m]))) * 100 > 80
) or vector(0)

count(
  node_load15{job="node"} > on(host) group_left() count by(host)(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",job="node"})
  or
  windows_system_processor_queue_length{job="windows"} > on(host) group_left() count by(host)(windows_cpu_time_total{mode="idle",job="windows"})
) or vector(0)

count(
  avg by(host)(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="iowait",job="node"}[15m])) / avg by(host)(rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{job="node"}[15m])) * 100 > 20
  or
  max by(host)(windows_logical_disk_current_disk_queue_length{job="windows",volume!~"HarddiskVolume.*|_Total"}) > 2
) or vector(0)

count(
  avg_over_time(((1 - (node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job="node",instance!~"$suppressed_high_memory"} / node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node",instance!~"$suppressed_high_memory"})) * 100)[10m:1m]) > 90
  or
  avg_over_time(((1 - (windows_memory_available_bytes{job="windows",instance!~"$suppressed_high_memory"} / windows_os_visible_memory_bytes{job="windows",instance!~"$suppressed_high_memory"})) * 100)[10m:1m]) > 90
) or vector(0)
count((max by(instance)(idrac_system_health) > 0) or on(instance) (up{job="idrac"} == 0)) or vector(0)
count(max by (host, model) (unifi_host_up) == 0 unless on(host) unifi_console_exempt) or vector(0)
count(unifi_device_up == 0 unless on(device) unifi_device_exempt) or vector(0)

count((os10_interface_up{interface=~"ethernet.*|port-channel.*|vti.*"} == 0) and on(switch, interface, port) (os10:interface_up_recent_7d{interface=~"ethernet.*|port-channel.*|vti.*"} == 1)) or vector(0)

panels.description: UniFi consoles currently offline but exempted from alerting.

targets.expr: count(max by (host, model) (unifi_host_up) == 0 and on(host) unifi_console_exempt) or vector(0)

panels.title: Consoles Acknowledged

panels.description: UniFi consoles currently offline and exempted from alerting. Manage exemptions at http://poc-containers/exemptions/suppress

targets.expr: max by (host, model) (unifi_host_up) == 0 and on(host) unifi_console_exempt

panels.title: Acknowledged Offline Items

options.content:
## Suppressing alerts from this dashboard

Certain stat panels on this dashboard (**Powered Off**, **Active Alerts**, **Backups Overdue**) can be configured to ignore specific VMs or alerts that are known/intentional.

**Manage suppressions:** open [http://poc-containers/exemptions/suppress](http://poc-containers/exemptions/suppress) -- the page lists all current suppressions and has a form to add or remove them.

| Panel | Category | Identifier |
|---|---|---|
| Powered Off | `powered_off` | VM name (e.g. `my-vm-01`) |
| Backups Overdue | `backup_overdue` | VM name (e.g. `my-vm-01`) |
| Active Alerts | `active_alert` | Alert name (e.g. `HostHighCPU`) |

Changes take effect within 30 seconds (next dashboard refresh).

---

## UniFi Device Exemptions

Devices can be excluded from the **network-unifi-offline** alert and hidden from the Device Status table in the UniFi Site Detail dashboard when offline. Use the dropdown in the **UniFi Device Exemptions** section at [http://poc-containers/exemptions/suppress](http://poc-containers/exemptions/suppress).

Changes take effect within 60 seconds.
